overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player exploring a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The player moves from an indoor bar through bustling city streets with vibrant holographic advertisements and wet reflective pavement, eventually entering another futuristic establishment with orange neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bar interior with neon accent lighting

agents.ego_description: panning across the bar interior observing patrons seated at round tables with glowing neon bases

notable_agents.action: woman with blue hair sitting at table looking at a device
woman with red hair sitting at table drinking

entered.detail: round tables with glowing purple neon bases and dark surfaces
large windows showing neon-lit cityscape outside
futuristic advertisements and graffiti on dark walls

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a dimly lit cyberpunk bar with purple neon lighting. Patrons sit at round tables with glowing bases while large windows reveal the neon city outside. The camera pans right across the room showing various NPCs engaged in conversation or using devices.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between bar interior and city street

events.description: exits the bar through glass doors onto the covered sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking out of the bar onto the wet street, observing the neon-lit surroundings

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car driving past on the wet reflective street

entered.detail: bright pink and cyan neon signs illuminating the street facade
sleek black sports car with glowing accents driving along the road

segments.scene_description: The player exits the bar onto a covered sidewalk, transitioning from the interior to the vibrant city street. A futuristic sports car drives past on the wet road as neon signs glow in the background, reflecting off the rain-slicked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk under overpass with neon advertisements

events.description: turns right to follow the sidewalk path under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the neon-lit sidewalk passing vending machines and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: illuminated vending machine with 'NICOLA' branding and drink advertisements
massive concrete overpass structure with blue accent lighting underneath

segments.scene_description: The player walks along the city sidewalk beneath a massive concrete overpass, passing illuminated vending machines and neon signs. The wet pavement reflects the colorful lights from surrounding advertisements as the camera moves forward through the sparse crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with crosswalks and towering skyscrapers

events.description: crosses the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk at the intersection
turns left to continue along the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and turning left to continue exploration of the city

notable_agents.action: person walking across the crosswalk in front of the camera

entered.detail: broad yellow-striped pedestrian crossing on dark asphalt
tall pole with traffic lights and pedestrian crossing signals
towering futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and massive billboards

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a wide open intersection, crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk amidst sparse pedestrian traffic. Towering skyscrapers with massive holographic billboards dominate the skyline as the camera turns left to follow the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with blue ceiling lighting

events.description: enters covered walkway with prominent blue ceiling panel lighting

agents.ego_description: walking straight through the covered corridor with blue overhead lights and advertisement screens

entered.detail: rectangular panels emitting cyan-blue light overhead in the covered walkway
tall vertical digital screens displaying animated product advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by distinctive blue ceiling panels. Tall digital advertisement pillars line the right side of the path while the city skyscrapers remain visible in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: entrance to 24-hour establishment with bright signage

events.description: ascends stairs and enters the building with neon orange interior lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the 24-hour bar with glowing pink entrance signage

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind small illuminated stall near the entrance

entered.detail: large pink neon sign with Japanese characters '24 時間営業' indicating 24-hour operation
short flight of stairs leading up into the establishment

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a building entrance marked by a bright pink neon sign indicating 24-hour operation. After passing a vendor stall, the player ascends the stairs and enters the establishment, transitioning from the blue-lit exterior to an orange-lit interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic bar interior with orange neon archways

agents.ego_description: walking through the bar interior observing patrons at tables and the futuristic orange neon decor

notable_agents.action: patron with red hair sitting at a futuristic bar table
person sitting at counter watching holographic screens

entered.detail: series of illuminated orange neon arches lining the corridor ceiling
sleek tables with integrated lighting and built-in digital interfaces
floating digital displays showing menu items and advertisements

segments.scene_description: Inside the new establishment, the player moves through a corridor defined by glowing orange neon archways. Patrons sit at futuristic tables with integrated lighting while holographic screens display advertisements. The atmosphere shifts from the cool blue exterior to a warm orange interior ambiance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the intimate, moody interior of a cyberpunk bar out into the sprawling, neon-drenched scale of a futuristic city intersection. It begins inside a dimly lit lounge with purple neon accents and patrons at glowing tables, panning across the room before moving toward the exit. As the camera steps onto a covered sidewalk, the environment shifts to a rain-slicked street where a futuristic sports car speeds past, its lights reflecting off the wet pavement. The scene then progresses beneath a massive concrete overpass, passing illuminated vending machines and colorful advertisements that shimmer on the ground. Finally, the view opens up into a wide intersection as the camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk, turning left toward a skyline dominated by towering skyscrapers and massive holographic billboards.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a cool, blue-lit pedestrian walkway into the warm, orange glow of a futuristic establishment. It begins under a covered path illuminated by blue ceiling panels, moving past tall digital advertisement pillars with skyscrapers looming in the distance. As the camera approaches a building entrance marked by a bright pink 24-hour neon sign, it passes a vendor stall and ascends a set of stairs. The scene then shifts from the blue exterior into a vibrant interior, where the camera glides through a corridor defined by glowing orange neon archways. Finally, the movement continues past patrons at integrated lighting tables and holographic screens, completing the transition into a warm, amber-hued atmosphere.
